title: Potainium Optimized
description: An Optimization Modpack Built for crappy Laptops/PC's which are really old
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df0b9363943b38e0f9876426efa6aace687379cb.png)

[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/d5bayHkz?color=blue)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/potainium-optimized)
[![Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/d5bayHkz?color=success)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/potainium-optimized)



**This Pack is based on [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably)**

This is an optimization-focused modpack designed for extremely low-end hardware. It is specifically tuned to provide a smooth experience on older laptops, such as the Lenovo L440 (Intel HD 4600), where it can achieve 120 FPS with optimized settings.
Featuresor less.

| Engine | Rendering | Memory      |
| ------ |:---------:| -----------:|
| Fabric | Sodium    | FerriteCore |

  

# Performance Data

Tested on a Lenovo L440 (i3-4000M, 8GB RAM, Intel HD 4600 Graphics) **[which is my main Laptop]**

Vanilla : 26.1: ~25-35 FPS

This Pack : 60 - 195 FPS (8 Chunks)

![Fps counter on Sodium extra](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55ac069bc4c19fdebfa3645813df9a929d7e30e3.png)

If you do want to use Potanium Optimized as a base in your own mod pack, feel free to do so, just make sure to include credit (a link back to this page works).
